name: Berry Pecan Cornbread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Dried tart cherries or cranberries
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Blend tofu with the next four ingredients (Soy milk, Cranberry-apple juice, Maple syrup, and Vanilla) using a fork until well combined.
3. Combine the blended mixture with cornmeal, Unbleached flour, Potato starch, Baking powder, Baking soda, and Salt. Mix thoroughly and set aside for 10 minutes.
4. Fold in sesame seeds, dried cherries or cranberries, and toasted whole pecans.
5. Pour the batter into an oiled loaf pan.
6. Bake for 45 minutes.
